reviews.review_description: This is a good game that lets you enjoy authentic fencing fights, though the UI and presentation still need polish. ▶ GOOD POINTS ◀ Gameplay: Enjoyable fencing VR gameplay with satisfying distance control, timing, and rapier handling. [4.5/5] ★ Rapier Texture: The rapier looks and feels convincing in VR. [4.5/5] ★ AI Matches: Fun and make distance and timing matter, though épée and sabre modes would be welcome. [4/5] ★ No Assist Effects: No slow-motion or combo gimmicks — natural fencing based on timing and judgment. [5/5] ▶ BAD POINTS ◀ UI Clarity: Similar icons make buttons hard to distinguish. [2.5/5] ★ Store Page: Doesn't clearly explain the game's appeal. [2/5] ★ Mini-Games: Add variety but feel rough and spread the game thin. [3/5] ▶ OVERALL: Core fencing is fun and authentic, but UI and side modes hold it back. [4/5]

developer_response.body: Sorry accidently released it, too late now just trying to iron out the bugs and update, thanks for the review .
